chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No. D-576 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge Priority 1. For hearing of Misc. 19774/2024 2. For hearing of main case 17-03-2025 Mr. Talha Javed Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Dhani Bakhsh Lashari, Advocate for the Respondent Mr. Jam Zeeshan Advocate for the Respondent M/s. Khursheed Jawed and Mubarak Ali Advocate for the Respondent/KDA Mr. Mamoon N. Chaudhry Advocate for the Respondent No.5 Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General Mr. Abdullah Magsi, Director LAB SEPA This petition pertain to illegal / unsanctioned use of residential plot No.62, Hatim Alvi Road, Old Clifton, Karachi. The learned counsel for the respondents undertake, upon instructions, that the said residential property shall not be used / permitted to be used for any illegal / unsanctioned purpose and / or for any purpose contrary to the terms of its allotment / lease. It is jointly stated that it may be just and proper for the petition to be allowed in terms aforesaid. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad PS
